meta.name: Michael O'Neal
meta.relocation: Open to relocation (paid), remote USA preferred

summary.headline: Software engineer with 25+ years of experience across every layer of the stack — from bare metal to neural networks.
summary.body: After a long consulting career, I retired in 2020. Breakthroughs in computer vision (AlexNet et al) brought me back. I spent a year returning to the math, then dove in from the ground up: DNNs, classifiers, CNNs, tensors, activations, backpropagation, attention mechanisms, tokenization, loss landscapes, gradient flow, and training dynamics. Built autonomous RL agents using the gaming model — Q-tables, Q-networks, self-play, policy systems (Sutton, Hassabis). Then deeper: policy gradients, PPO, RLHF pipelines, DPO, and modern policy engineering techniques like GRPO. Was well-primed for GPT's arrival and dove into LLMs as early as the GPT-3 API. Built and trained voice synthesis models from Tacotron through XTTS — including custom voice models that fooled Snoop Dogg's wife and agent, and 50 Cent. Since then I've been deep in Vision-Language-Action models (VLAs), multimodal systems, and building the production infrastructure around them. I know the full stack from silicon to policy optimization. Assembly to transformers. Pointers to RLHF. I can read a training loop, debug a gradient, fine-tune a model, design the RLHF pipeline, and build the production system that serves it. My agents now do 100% of my coding — I am the architect and the tester.
summary.tagline: Software Engineer • AI Systems Architect • Autonomous Agent Systems Developer since 1997

experience.title: CTO
experience.description: Built an automated platform that files insurance payment claims using AI-assisted automation.

bullets.text: Designed automation systems combining ML models with traditional software systems
Reduced operational costs by ~90% through AI-driven automation
Fine-tuned, evaluated, and benchmarked Vision-Language Models (VLMs)
Built a synthetic data generation pipeline to enable HIPAA-compliant training workflows
Developed an autonomous coding and maintenance agent (precursor to MiniClaw) capable of maintaining and extending the system
Automated myself out of the CTO role — the agent now handles day-to-day support requests, development, optimization, and maintenance

experience.title: Retired — Independent Study in Machine Learning
experience.description: Retired from consulting but became deeply interested in the rapid progress of AI and machine learning.

bullets.text: Studied machine learning from the ground up: neural networks, deep learning, reinforcement learning, unsupervised learning, and modern training methods
Worked with multimodal systems across text, image, audio, and video models
Built reinforcement learning agents using gaming-style environments, including Q-tables, policy systems, and self-play training
Began working with LLM APIs during the early GPT-3 era
Experimented with speech synthesis systems from Tacotron through XTTS, including training custom voice models
Developed early LLM-driven agent systems using vector search, webhooks, cron orchestration, and tool-use architectures
Distilled 30 years of programming knowledge into operational rules that autonomous coding agents could use

experience.title: Software Development Consultant
experience.description: Independent consultant working across multiple industries and technology stacks.

bullets.text: System architecture and backend systems for clients including Uber, Intel, PayPal, Microsoft, Callaway Golf, Upper Deck
Microservices and distributed platforms across e-commerce, social media, logistics, biology, banking, and DeFi
Data processing systems and pipelines
Web applications and APIs in C, C#, JavaScript, React, Ruby, Python
Billing rates ranged from $80–$150/hour across 8 years of consulting

experience.title: Senior Software Engineer
experience.description: Worked on production systems and engineering teams for major technology companies.

bullets.text: Engineering work on production systems at YouTube, Teach.com, and Intel
Managed small engineering teams and maintained code quality and development standards
Built automation and internal developer tooling

ai_projects.description: Recent independent work focused on building autonomous AI systems that combine modern AI models with traditional software infrastructure.
